description_long: This object depicts a large school complex situated on a rectangular plot, featuring multiple interconnected buildings with flat and slightly sloped roofs. The main structure is a prominent, multi-story building with white and blue roofing, surrounded by several smaller auxiliary buildings with varied roof colors including blue, green, and red. The grounds include paved areas, green lawns, and a few clusters of trees, suggesting outdoor recreational or assembly spaces. The layout is organized, with clear separations between buildings and open spaces, and the presence of access roads and parking areas is visible. The school is set within a suburban or semi-rural environment, bordered by fields and other low-rise structures. The overall design is functional, with a focus on accessibility and utility for educational purposes.
description: A large, multi-building school complex with flat and sloped roofs, surrounded by open grounds, trees, and access roads. The campus features a mix of white, blue, and green roofs and is set in a suburban landscape.
description_view_0: The main school building with a white roof is prominent, with adjacent smaller buildings and a cluster of trees visible at the rear.
description_view_1: The view highlights the rear and side of the complex, showing more of the green-roofed buildings and a line of trees along the edge.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the elongated main building and the open grounds, with trees and auxiliary structures in the foreground.
description_view_3: The side and back of the school are visible, with blue and green roofs and a clear view of the surrounding fields and parking areas.
